name: dark matter

VINIT.justification: The initial quantum state during inflation before particle production.

TANCH.justification: The universal boundary that contains and mediates all dark matter interactions.

AFWD.justification: The forward transformation of vacuum fluctuations into real particles via cosmic expansion.

AREV.justification: The descent from uniform distribution into localized potential wells/halos.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of phase-space positions to determine the cosmic web structure.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity of the matter is its gravitational signature; it is what it weighs.

FSPLIT.justification: A single field fluctuation splits into a frozen super-horizon mode and a sub-horizon observer.

FFUSE.justification: The modes reconstitute into a classical density perturbation (scaffolding).

EVALT.justification: Successful alignment with the observed cosmic microwave background power spectrum.

EVALF.justification: The rejected branch where dark matter fluctuations do not track the photon fluid.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice: possessing mass (information) yet zero non-gravitational information content (void).

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record of dark matter density fixed at freeze-out/production.

phase_3.both_description: The Floor: Mass exists (1) but Information is zero (0) simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: Establish the Bunch-Davies vacuum state during the inflationary epoch.
Define the field identity as a free massive scalar with conformal coupling ξ=1/6.
Perform horizon exit; split the quantum fluctuation into distinct topological branches.
Anchor the T-arm with adiabatic initial conditions to ensure CMB consistency.
Propagate the super-horizon mode through the expansion of de Sitter space.
Account for the redshift and dilution of number density as the universe cools.
Monitor for isocurvature; if detected, the branch is suppressed by the conformal coupling.
Execute horizon re-entry; reconstitute the branches into a coherent density seed.
Compose the seeds into the Vlasov-Poisson flow to initiate structure formation.
Hold the C=0 state; maintain mass presence without activating non-gravitational channels.
Fix the relic abundance Ω_DM ≈ 0.12 as a permanent record in the cosmic budget.
Anchor the final state to the metric tensor, completing the gravitational-only loop.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Bogoliubov Transformation (maps vacuum to particle states)
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Gravitational lensing and potential well coupling
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Cosmic Web (spatial distribution of halos)
phase_5.alfs_store: The Planck Collaboration Data (canonical relic density)

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Topological prediction of invariants (winding/mass) costs no information erasure.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → CLINK → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: dark matter
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑳  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑱 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def dark_matter_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Establish the Bunch-Davies vacuum state during the inflationary epoch.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Define the field identity as a free massive scalar with conformal coupling ξ=...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Perform horizon exit; split the quantum fluctuation into distinct topological branches.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Anchor the T-arm with adiabatic initial conditions to ensure CMB consistency.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Propagate the super-horizon mode through the expansion of de Sitter space.)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Account for the redshift and dilution of number density as the universe cools.)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Monitor for isocurvature; if detected, the branch is suppressed by the confor...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Execute horizon re-entry; reconstitute the branches into a coherent density seed.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compose the seeds into the Vlasov-Poisson flow to initiate structure formation.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the C=0 state; maintain mass presence without activating non-gravitation...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Fix the relic abundance Ω_DM ≈ 0.12 as a permanent record in the cosmic budget.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the final state to the metric tensor, completing the gravitational-onl...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def dark_matter_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (dark_matter_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def dark_matter_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (dark_matter_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem dark_matter_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
